user_query: I'm planning a family reunion and we want to have a music-themed party. Can you suggest some popular country songs and top R&B/hip-hop artists to create a playlist? Also, find the lyrics for the song 'Happy' by Pharrell Williams.

TaskList.description: Gather a list of popular country songs.
Compile a list of top R&B/hip-hop artists.
Retrieve the lyrics for the song 'Happy' by Pharrell Williams.
Create a comprehensive playlist by combining the country songs and R&B/hip-hop artists.
